name: universal-video-generator
description: Universal AI video/TTS interface layer + dynamic workflow orchestrator with long-video stitching and self-evolution. Capability-driven selection, @voice1 voice lock, batch concurrency, multi-tenant SaaS, telemetry-driven evolution (SkillOpt/Hermes-inspired), ffmpeg assembly, CLI/HTTP server, plugin adapters.

scripts.test: ts-node test/core.test.ts && ts-node test/runtime.test.ts && ts-node test/commercial.test.ts && ts-node test/server.test.ts && ts-node test/evolution.test.ts && ts-node test/longvideo.test.ts
